story.text:
# 📄 Moon Phase Notation Spec
**document** · swordsman · knowledge

Stratum-to-phase encoding: Hamming weight 0-6 maps 🌑→🌒→🌓→🌔→🌖→🌗→🌕. Visibility encoding that reveals sovereignty posture without disclosing content. The dark part is the privacy; the lit part is the proof. Source: zk blades forge/ceremony/moon-phase-notation.md.
